title: Kuba's Food Pack!
description: Adds tons of new food items, drinks and even bonuses - furnitures!
body:
### WARNING.
This mod is still in beta release. Bugs may occur, if you spot one, please share it to the comments!


------

### About:
This mod adds tons of food and drinks that weren't added in the real game. There are more than 10 food items!

List of food & drink items:

- Fries (craftable)
- Tomato (from tomato seeds)
- Chicken Leg (craftable)
- Green Apple (craftable)
- Ice Cream (craftable)
- Chocolate (craftable)
- Cheeseburger (craftable)
- Cheese (craftable)
- Green Apple with Sugar (craftable)
- Dry Apple (obtainable when cooking a apple)
- Baked Bread (craftable)
- Food Bowl with Beetroot (craftable) (special effects)
- Food Bowl with Carrot (craftable) (special effects)
- Food Bowl with Tomato (craftable) (special effects)
- Food Bowl with Chicken (craftable) (special effects)
- Cola Pop - Fizzy Drink (craftable)

List of ingredients:

- Paper Bag (craftable)
- Cooked Flour (craftable)
- Raw Flour (craftable)
- Fruit Sugar (craftable)
- Sauce Bowl (craftable)
- Tomato Sauce (craftable)

List of the rest:

- Food Bowl (craftable)
- Tomato seed (obtainable only in creative mode...)

More items are going to be introduced in the future!
![~ Current food & drink items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4e92a3c2659c1f054ac4f4e6ac0a1a9e507202d8.png)

---

### Avaliable versions (as of now):
- 1.20.1 - Public Beta Release 1
- 1.12.2 - Public Beta Release 1
 

---

### In progress versions (as of now):
- Nothing for now.
 

---

### Planned versions (as of now):
- 1.14.4 - stay tuned!
- 1.16.4 - stay tuned!
- 1.16.5 - stay tuned!
- 1.18.2 - stay tuned!
- 1.19.4 - stay tuned!
- 1.20.4 - stay tuned!
- 1.21 - stay tuned!

---

Sadly, this mod is not for Fabric. And i'll never port it to Fabric, sorry. This mod will always be Forge.
